name: drifttype-pointer-text
title: Pointer Text
author: Kaiyi Wong
description: Displaces individually rendered glyphs with pointer-driven spring physics while retaining one semantic phrase.

changes: Added a client boundary and deferred canvas measurement until the caller's font finishes loading.
Added caller-selected span, paragraph, or heading semantics while keeping the SVG presentation hidden from assistive technology and focus.
Replaced the fixed 800 by 120 viewBox with dimensions derived from measured glyphs, font height, and interaction radius.
Added deterministic reduced-motion, coarse/no-hover, and touch fallbacks plus hidden-document and offscreen settling.
Stored and cancelled animation frames during settling, reconfiguration, and unmount.
Allowed a caller-selected span, paragraph, or heading element and removed the duplicate role and accessible-name exposure so only its text node supplies the phrase.

license.scope: src/react/PointerText.tsx, src/core/pointer.ts, src/core/types.ts, src/renderers/svg.ts, and src/a11y/semantic.ts

modifications.change: Made the React adapter semantic, responsive, font-aware, motion-preference-aware, visibility-gated, and explicit about animation-frame cleanup without changing its pointer-physics modes.
modifications.reason: Close the documented accessibility, responsive rendering, reduced-motion, coarse/touch, hidden/offscreen, font-loading, and cleanup release gates with a source-local adapter repair.

modifications.change: Changed the hidden semantic node to a caller-selected text element and removed role=img and aria-label duplication.
modifications.reason: Preserve heading or paragraph semantics and expose the phrase exactly once while the SVG remains aria-hidden.
